root_structure..crustagent/: Project intelligence, skills, memory, truthpack, and stability locks
root_structure.src/server/: Backend feature clusters (db, routes, middleware, utils)
root_structure.tests/: HardShell testing suite (unit, integration, error paths, security)

technical_stack.backend: Node.js + Express + better-sqlite3 (or better-sqlite3-multiple-ciphers for SQLCipher)
technical_stack.infrastructure: Docker + Container volume mounts + Cloudflare Tunnel ready
technical_stack.testing: Vitest + Supertest (HardShell 4-phase: unit, integration, error paths, security)
technical_stack.encryption: SQLCipher AES-256 (database at rest via DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY)

npm_scripts.scuttle:prod-start: build && NODE_ENV=production tsx server.ts & vite preview (UI+API :4545 + :4646, both 0.0.0.0)

gotchas: tsx --watch does NOT support --ignore flag on Node v22 — it will crash silently. Never add --ignore to tsx --watch.
npm rebuild better-sqlite3 required after Node runtime upgrades (binary mismatch).
sessionStorage is used for token persistence — NOT IndexedDB. Cleared on browser close.
Dev server: localhost:4545 (not on LAN). Prod preview: 0.0.0.0:4545 (LAN-accessible).
scuttle:prod-start builds frontend first (npm run build), then starts Express + vite preview.
Docker: NEVER use 'npm install --omit=dev' — tsx is needed at runtime. Use 'npm install' only.
Docker: CMD must use npx (e.g. CMD ["npx", "tsx", "server.ts"]) to locate tsx via npm PATH.
Docker: Entrypoint is pass-through only (exec su-exec node "$@") — don't add command logic like npx.
Docker: Healthcheck start_period must be >= 15s for better-sqlite3 initialization.
Docker error 'su-exec: tsx: No such file or directory' = check Dockerfile npm install and CMD format.
DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY: Leave unset for plaintext (dev), set to 'openssl rand -base64 32' for production.
CF Tunnel: Always set TRUST_PROXY=true, CORS_ORIGIN=https://your-domain, ENFORCE_HTTPS=true.
CORS: Three-mode system (dev, LAN, strict). Strict mode requires CORS_ORIGIN env var.
Testing: HardShell suite includes real DB (no mocks), integration paths, error scenarios, and security checks.
React Query: Mutations (updateBookmark, deleteBookmark, saveBookmark) update cache optimistically — no full refetch.
Virtualization: BookmarkGrid uses @tanstack/react-virtual — only 15 cards in DOM regardless of pages loaded.
Pagination: Default 50 items/page. Use db.getBookmarks(50, offset) to fetch pages. Search debounce is 300ms.

phase_1_performance_complete.react_query_infinite_scroll: useInfiniteQuery with optimistic mutations (star, delete, edit, archive)
phase_1_performance_complete.virtualization: @tanstack/react-virtual caps DOM at 15 cards regardless of pages loaded
phase_1_performance_complete.search_debounce: 300ms debounce via useDebounce hook in src/lib/utils.ts
phase_1_performance_complete.query_caching: @tanstack/react-query manages infinite scroll cache, refetchOnWindowFocus: false
files_created: src/hooks/useInfiniteBookmarks.ts — infinite query hook with mutations
phase_1_performance_complete.tests_passing: 73/73 HardShell tests (unit, integration, error paths, security)
phase_1_performance_complete.performance_impact: Perceived load time ~10-15x faster, smooth scrolling, instant mutations

testing_architecture.phase_2: Integration tests (API routes, database transactions, auth flows)
testing_architecture.phase_3: Error paths (malformed input, race conditions, constraint violations)
testing_architecture.phase_4: Security tests (auth bypass attempts, CORS validation, permission checks)
testing_architecture.setup: testDb.ts (in-memory fixtures), testAuth.ts (token generation), testFactories.ts (data factories)
testing_architecture.coverage_target: All critical paths, auth middleware, API routes, database operations

deployment_ready.cloudflare_tunnel: Full documentation added to README.md with 8-step setup
deployment_ready.cors_security: Three-mode CORS with CORS_ORIGIN allowlisting for CF Tunnel
deployment_ready.database_encryption: SQLCipher integration via DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY (AES-256 at rest)
